Sporali Defender's Blade  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 37
DMG: 17 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 5.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: PAL SHD
Race: ALL except BAR ELF VAH
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Sporali Defender's Blade
Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 37
DMG: 17 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 5.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: PAL SHD
Race: ALL except BAR ELF VAH
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Slashing
Light:Paw of Opalla
Stackable:No
Tribute:42

Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-05 11:30:16
Page Updated:Sat Jun 14th, 2025

Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 20
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Clan RunnyEye
NPC Name
a Sporali Defender - Runnyeye
a Sporali Miner
a Sporali Scavenger
The Sporali Moldmaster

▲ Page top
2.1 ratio vs 1.9
QuoteReply
# Dec 30 2003 at 11:39 PM Rating: Decent
Valdon
674 posts
I am sure this weapon is more rare, it does not have the Strength and Stamina, but take a look at this compared to the Ceni Longsword...

There is a reasonable difference but when you concider the level to obtain, its quite a bit different. I dont know how common a centi is, but from what I have seen this guy is a pretty solid camp.

My 34 ranger stood toe to toe with him, buffed... I could have given him a better fight. But he devoured me. Shield is visable on the mob.

Centi Longsword
MAGIC ITEM
Weight: 6.5 Size: MEDIUM
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Damage: 14 Delay: 27
Ratio: 1.928 Amazing
Damage Bonus: 13 (lvl 65)
Comparative Efficiency: 75
Offhand Efficiency: 32
-------
Str: +8 Sta: +8
Weapon Skill: One Hand Slash
Classes: Ranger Paladin Shadowknight Bard Rogue Warrior
Races: All Races
Slot 1: Type 4
Required: Yes

Scholar
18 posts
I have one question: How could this be dual weilded considering the fact that neither of the classes that may use this can dual weild?
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 22 2002 at 10:45 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) He wasn't talking about Dual wielding this sword, rather the Centi SS, which, as you know, is a popular midlevel offhand sword. Heck, my poor Level 39 Ranger still uses one with his Lupine Dagger. If anyone thinks a level 39 Ranger shouldn't still be using a CSS... send a Tell to Garniham on Karana and I'll gladly take whichever weapon you'll buy me :-)

# May 13 2003 at 4:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765525919
Scholar
748 posts
Well this is an old picture, before gnomes could be palladins and SKs, halflings could be palladins, and frogloks were even playable. You're correct, it's just that this picture is out of date. You'll note in the description that gnomes, halflings, and frogloks are listed as being able to use this; only the picture omits them.

#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 26 2002 at 5:55 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hahaha, today i ripped this off for 20pp today in The Bazaar! No joke! Very nice weapon but my close friend who is a 57 enchanter, got me a 10/22 +5 str 1hs so i will be selling this on Xev. I think i still got a hell of a deal on this one.
Good Buy
QuoteReply
# Jul 08 2002 at 7:20 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759447592
2 posts
My brother bought this for his 27 lvl Troll SK last night he paid 150plat for it. Just in case anyone is PCing. We play on Drinal Server.
▲ Page top
RE: Good Buy
QuoteReply
# Aug 26 2002 at 11:19 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1613953023551
99 posts
Personally, I lucked out at the Bazaar and found a seller unloading one for 50 plat! Everyone else was at 100-150 or better, so you better believe I bought the one!

For my fellow Paladins out there, let me tell ya... This weapon rocks, plain and simple. I've played characters who are built for dual wielding and for 2hs smackdown. I built my Pally to tank and disrupt casters via shield bash.

This chunk o' steel holds aggro nicely as I chop away at the mobs for up to 41 damage or so. I'm not eager to give it up for 2hs, despite the epic. And with my Shield of the Stalwart Seas (another steal I got for 100pp), I can hold my own against most foes. I can lay down some serious damage Double Attacking with this sword and causing havoc with spellcasters with Bash (and my SvM of 48 helps, too).

I'll gladly give up the high-damage of a two-hander for all the benefits of using my one-two punch. Don't discount the value of 1hs and the tanking pally!

Thederick Varsuun
<Celestial Elements>
23 Paladin
Lanys T'Vyl
▲ Page top
RE: Good Buy
QuoteReply
# Sep 10 2002 at 8:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770565912
12 posts
Let me echo Thederick's post from a SK point of view. This is like having a 2hs weapon AND getting the use of Bash with a shield.

After I trained in Double Attack, I went back to OT and found a Barbed Succulent that was dark blue to me. I started the attack and instantly slashed for 36 and 34 with a 20 bash. I on the other hand got hit for 11. I finished off the Barbed succulent in short order and hardly lost any health. I will trade 90 dmg for 11 dmg with a MOB anyday.

I know I need to have 2hs for my epic, but this 1hs is hard to beat, especially in groups when you need bash to interrupt casters.
▲ Page top
Skills most likely
QuoteReply
# Jun 27 2002 at 8:01 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591767912311
Scholar
20 posts
The two monks probably didn't work on their skills due to being able to breeze through the early levels too fast. I tried to see if twinking and powerleveling would ruin a character. Made a dwarf warrior and gave him armor, weapons and some plat. Gave him 3 backpacks, 1 full of Crushbone Belts, the 2nd with Crushbone Pads and the 3rd with Bone Chips. Turned in the belts and pads and headed to North Kaladim to turn in the bones in the Paladin guild. Long story short, the little guy is up to 12 and I'm still trying to get his skills up to cap. He's not that great due to not have good defense or even 2hs =\ Anyway, most (not all) twinks don't work on skills so that they don't last as long as the other classes in a fight.

Getting Defender Sword and Others
QuoteReply
# Apr 02 2002 at 12:01 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591777604590
5 posts
Ok, this is what happened

i was running around in freeroot killing lizardman broodlings at lvl 1

a lvl 38 sk ogre (which was my lvl and class) ran up, gave me 500gp 600sp and 3000cp a long with the sporali defender sword, a chitin shell sheild, and like 20 lizard tails!!!!!!

now, who can argue with that? that was some awesome luck!
▲ Page top
Moldmaster is overrated
QuoteReply
# Mar 29 2002 at 5:16 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592250805840
28 posts
I killed him pretty easy. Here's the vitals:

36 Pally with FP armor and a few random items in addition. Wielding a BABS. He was Dark blue to me and I smacked him. His regen is viscious but if you can keep nailing him his life will drop. He forced me to use my LH and I killed him with 2 red bubs of life left.

He dropped the Defender, which I gave to my L2 SK :)
▲ Page top
RE: Moldmaster is overrated
QuoteReply
# Jun 09 2002 at 10:36 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595780131429
464 posts
Ummm, if you had to use your LoH and still only had 2 bubbles left, then he wasn't easy dumbass.
▲ Page top
RE: Moldmaster is overrated
QuoteReply
# Dec 31 2003 at 1:23 AM Rating: Decent
Valdon
674 posts
I dont fully aggree with you. some people are comfortable starting a fight with say 30% health? Laugh. Besides a LONG fight is not always a DIFFICULT fight. I mean if he can clearly tell he IS winning and stands his ground.... then its just a long fight. I mean adds and harm touches, spells and stuff thats when its ugly. if he correctly calculated it and chopped the guy up. hes fine, it can still be concidred 'easy'... hes not dead :D - ok some might say thats difficult... fine.

Glorard Gravesmite
LvL 28 Pally Dwarf Tarew Marr
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 07 2002 at 10:09 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) what does the ingame graphic for this look like?
Our group got 2 from sporali defenders one day
QuoteReply
# Dec 24 2001 at 9:16 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592251994619
6 posts
Our group got 2 from sporali defenders one day.

Within a 4 hour period, two dropped for us in the room with 5 entrances and the wagon in the center. As a ranger I love to pull to this room as it is centrally located to pull both Goblin Destroyers for that precious Blackened alloy armor and the nice weapons and to pull the sporali Defenders and their kin.

That room is also very safe except for the occasional Sporali Defender roaming in.

our group was around 22- 24 when we looted the the sporali Defender Blades. As we had no paladins, I was lucky enough to win the roll for one of the swords.

Needless to say it was reason enough for me to start a paladin character.
▲ Page top
Our group got 2 from sporali defenders one day
QuoteReply
# Dec 24 2001 at 9:16 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592251994619
6 posts
Our group got 2 from sporali defenders one day.

Within a 4 hour period, two dropped for us in the room with 5 entrances and the wagon in the center. As a ranger I love to pull to this room as it is centrally located to pull both Goblin Destroyers for that precious Blackened alloy armor and the nice weapons and to pull the sporali Defenders and their kin.

That room is also very safe except for the occasional Sporali Defender roaming in.

our group was around 22- 24 when we looted the the sporali Defender Blades. As we had no paladins, I was lucky enough to win the roll for one of the swords.

Needless to say it was reason enough for me to start a paladin character.
▲ Page top
Con and Drops
QuoteReply
# Dec 07 2001 at 6:42 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591762757128
4 posts
Spent a bit of time in here with my 40SK

I was looking for the sporali gloves as I am using a slow 2hs.

Over a day or so of logging on and off Saw the moldmaster on the platform 5x

He always conned blue to me.

First I cast cancel magic on him to remove the thorn shield and then trained him out of the room a bit (sometimes to the ramp to lvl 4)

Then I darknessed him, Heat blood and Heart flutter, and with a few lifetaps killed him averaging half health and mana. He dropped the blade EVERY time.

This however has made me very KOS here and so I aggro the defenders.... My tactic was to run to zone and then back in again.

Moldmaster just stood there at the zone edge and I picked him off easy. This was the only time he spawned the sporelings too.

Nice low lvl sword shame I had to let 3 of them rot as the zone was deserted..
▲ Page top
